name: Ansh Madaan
education: B.Tech, Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology (2023 - Present)

projects.name: EEG-based Schizophrenia Detection using Deep Learning
projects.description: Developed a hybrid CNN-LSTM with attention model achieving 97% accuracy for EEG feature extraction, utilizing Grad-CAM and Integrated Gradients for model interpretability.

projects.name: Face Recognition-Based Chatbot Authentication System
projects.description: Built a secure conversational chatbot system authenticated using real-time facial recognition and encoding with OpenCV.

projects.name: Voice Assisted Terminal
projects.description: Engineered a voice-controlled terminal utilizing Google's generative AI models to execute shell commands via natural language, published as a PyPI package.
